'''Twool''' was a young [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] apprentice in [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] order, [[35 ABY/Legends|five years]] after the [[Sekot accords|peace treaty]] between the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

Twool was assigned to introduce [[Cal Omas]] and [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Mitt'swe'kleoni]] to the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] during a [[Masters' Council]] meeting in the new Jedi Temple. However, Luke Skywalker sensed the presence of his visitors, and opened the door to a surprised Twool. Skywalker shooed Twool from the chamber as the [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] and the Aristocra entered. Later Luke asked Twool to bring [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] to him so they could talk.

During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], Twool was a full-fledged [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. He flew several missions in a [[StealthX]] and was tasked with using his [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter's]] special [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] to monitor Jacen Solo. Later, Twool would fly in [[Rakehell Squadron]] under the command of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. Twool was killed when the Rakehells squared off against [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].
